name: com.fidensa/mcp-server
description: Independent AI capability certification data via MCP. Check trust scores, search certified capabilities, compare alternatives, verify signed artifacts, and report runtime experience. Fidensa certifies MCP servers, skills, rules files, hooks, sub-agents, and plugins through SBOM analysis, security scanning, adversarial testing, and behavioral fingerprinting.

environmentVariables.description: API key for full contract access. Free at fidensa.com/docs/api. Not required for check_certification and search_capabilities.
environmentVariables.name: FIDENSA_API_KEY
